summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FBI Case Files MVP. Backend APIs fully functional, frontend UI working with minor navigation issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Registration form submission may not redirect properly to dashboard in some cases

integration_issues.issue: Direct URL access to /subscription redirects to login even when authenticated
integration_issues.workaround: Access subscription through dashboard navigation works correctly

passed_tests: API health check (404 expected for root)
Landing page loads with FBI noir theme
Owner portal login and dashboard functionality
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor UI flow improvements needed: (1) Ensure consistent authentication state handling for direct URL access to protected routes like /subscription, (2) Verify registration form submission redirects work reliably in all browsers
